title: doronicum plantagineum subsp. atlanticum
intro: Doronicum plantagineum subsp. atlanticum, a subspecies of the Doronicum plantagineum, is a flowering plant in the dandelion family known for its medicinal and health-promoting properties. This plant has been traditionally used to treat various health issues due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it a potential remedy for digestive problems, wounds, and infections. The health benefits of Doronicum plantagineum subsp. atlanticum include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. The plant can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, with its leaves and flowers typically being used in traditional medicine.
